welcome.subject: Welcome to PsicoAIssist!
welcome.title: Welcome to PsicoAIssist!
welcome.intro: We are pleased to welcome you to PsicoAIssist, your new AI assistant to optimize your psychological practice.
welcome.help: If you need help, our team is available at

verification.subject: Verify your account - PsicoAIssist
verification.title: Verify your Email
verification.message: Thanks for registering with PsicoAIssist. To get started, please verify your email address by clicking the link below:
verification.ignore: If you did not create an account on PsicoAIssist, you can ignore this message.

subscription.subject: Subscription successfully activated!
subscription.title: Subscription Confirmed!
subscription.subtitle: Excellent choice!
subscription.message: Your subscription to the {planName} Plan has been successfully activated.

reset_password.subject: Reset Password - PsicoAIssist
reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.message: You have requested to reset your password. Click the link below to create a new password:
reset_password.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour for security. If you did not request this change, ignore this email.

cancellation.subject: Subscription Cancelled - PsicoAIssist
cancellation.title: Subscription Cancelled
cancellation.message: Your subscription has been cancelled. You will continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.
cancellation.goodbye: We hope to see you back soon. If you change your mind, you can reactivate your subscription at any time.

session_reminder.subject: Session Reminder - PsicoAIssist
session_reminder.title: Session Reminder
session_reminder.message: You have a session scheduled for tomorrow. Here are the details:

client_reminder.subject: Appointment Reminder with {professionalName}
client_reminder.title: Appointment Reminder
client_reminder.message: This is a reminder for your scheduled appointment with {professionalName}.

onboarding.subject: On-boarding Pack: Let's start! 🚀
onboarding.title: On-boarding Started!
onboarding.message: We have received your On-boarding Pack order. Thank you for trusting us!
onboarding.process: Our technical team has been notified and will begin preparing your custom web server. This process usually takes between 24 and 48 business hours.

next_steps.1: An assigned technician will review your request.
next_steps.2: We will configure your dedicated environment.
next_steps.3: We will contact you via email when everything is ready to give you the access credentials for your new server.

onboarding.interim: In the meantime, you can continue using the platform normally.

daily_summary.subject: Agenda Summary - Tomorrow ({count} visits)
daily_summary.title: Your Agenda for Tomorrow
daily_summary.message: You have {count} sessions scheduled for tomorrow.

video_call.subject: Video Conference Invitation - {professionalName}
video_call.message: {professionalName} has invited you to a video conference session.
video_call.instruction: Please click the link below to join the call at the agreed time:
video_call.fallback: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
video_call.footer: This is an automatic message from PsicoAIssist.

common.spam_notice: If you do not receive the email in your inbox, please check your spam folder and mark it as not spam.
